hero.description: International IT Engineer · AI & Full Stack Developer · Creator of intelligent digital solutions

about.title: Who am I?
about.subtitle: Elite IT Engineer & Digital Innovator
about.p1: With deep experience in information technology, I am an expert in software development, artificial intelligence, networking and system administration. Graduate in Computer Systems, Software Engineering and AI at Université Protestante de Lubumbashi (UPL), I design robust applications and intelligent systems that turn technical challenges into concrete solutions.
about.p2: Passionate about innovation and digital transformation, I have created numerous applications and intelligent systems. Mastering both frontend and backend, I solve complex problems with rigor and creativity. As a professional trainer in computing and programming, I share my expertise to elevate the digital skills of the new generation.
